summary: SDM Card Validity - All features tested successfully. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All validity UI elements displaying correctly - activation/expiration dates, days remaining, progress bar, and card renewal option for expired cards. Landing page shows dynamic card durations from API.
seed_data_creation: Test client has Gold card purchased on 05/03/2026, expires 05/03/2027 (365 days). Diamond custom card exists with 730 days (2 ans).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card validity features all working. Client dashboard shows: days remaining, activation/expiration dates, progress bar, and renewal button for expired cards. Landing page dynamically fetches card durations from API.

mocked_apis_list: MoMo payment via BulkClix (cash payment used for test card purchase)

Card_Validity_Endpoint.my_card_endpoint: ✅ PASS - Returns validity object with is_active, is_expired, days_remaining, start_date, end_date

Card_Status_Endpoint.quick_status: ✅ PASS - Returns has_card, card_type, status, days_remaining, message

Admin_Get_Client.validity_fields: ✅ PASS - status, is_active, days_remaining, duration_days, purchased_at, expires_at

Frontend_Client_Dashboard.card_display: ✅ PASS - Ma Carte section with Gold card

Frontend_Landing_Page.card_durations_display: ✅ PASS - Shows '1 an' with clock icon for Silver, Gold, Platinum
